BSAD_BSID_FILTER: INSERT INTO IA.ANALYTICS_CUSTOM.BSAD_BSID_FILTER(MANDT, BUKRS, KUNNR, UMSKS, UMSKZ, AUGDT, AUGBL, ZUONR, GJAHR, BELNR, BUZEI, BUDAT, BLDAT, XBLNR, WRBTR, DMBTR, WAERS, SHKZG, CPUDT, XZAHL) SELECT MANDT, BUKRS, KUNNR, UMSKS, UMSKZ, AUGDT, AUGBL, ZUONR, GJAHR, BELNR, BUZEI, BUDAT, BLDAT, XBLNR, WRBTR, DMBTR, WAERS, SHKZG, CPUDT, XZAHL FROM IA.ANALYTICS_CUSTOM.BSAD_FILTER UNION ALL SELECT MANDT, BUKRS, KUNNR, UMSKS, UMSKZ, AUGDT, AUGBL, ZUONR, GJAHR, BELNR, BUZEI, BUDAT, BLDAT, XBLNR, WRBTR, DMBTR, WAERS, SHKZG, CPUDT, XZAHL FROM IA.ANALYTICS_CUSTOM.BSID_FILTER
BSAK_BSIK_FILTER: INSERT INTO IA.ANALYTICS_CUSTOM.BSAK_BSIK_FILTER(MANDT, BUKRS, LIFNR, UMSKS, UMSKZ, AUGDT, AUGBL, ZUONR, GJAHR, BELNR, BUZEI, XBLNR, WRBTR, DMBTR, SHKZG, WAERS, BUDAT, BLDAT, CPUDT, ZTERM, XZAHL) SELECT MANDT, BUKRS, LIFNR, UMSKS, UMSKZ, AUGDT, AUGBL, ZUONR, GJAHR, BELNR, BUZEI, XBLNR, WRBTR, DMBTR, SHKZG, WAERS, BUDAT, BLDAT, CPUDT, ZTERM, XZAHL FROM IA.ANALYTICS_CUSTOM.BSAK_FILTER UNION ALL SELECT MANDT, BUKRS, LIFNR, UMSKS, UMSKZ, AUGDT, AUGBL, ZUONR, GJAHR, BELNR, BUZEI, XBLNR, WRBTR, DMBTR, SHKZG, WAERS, BUDAT, BLDAT, CPUDT, ZTERM, XZAHL FROM IA.ANALYTICS_CUSTOM.BSIK_FILTER
